improvements: Mandate the inclusion of specific evidence snippets (Source IP, User ID, Timestamp) for any investigation score above 60.
Add a mandatory 'Contextual Enrichment' step requiring documentation of ASN/Geo reputation lookups for all external connections identified in the alert.
Introduce a 'Critical Evidence Link' requirement: Escalate status must be coupled with an array of specific log UIDs or evidence objects to prevent vague justifications.
